title: Hi everyone. I fell into a deep obsession over the last 4 months trying to build a machine learning model that can predict the BTC price. Now I have a crypto trading bot that just made me 60% on my portfolio. Crazy ride.
author: Traditional_Ear5237
selftext:
Apparently it is possible to build a model that is correct enough times that you can build a bot around it. I honestly did not believe it was possible because I completely failed for 3 months straight. I had my laptop, my wive’s laptop, and my gaming PC training models 24/7 trying to get to the one architecture that would work. And it did. Currently I would like to give it as much money as I can. Looking for investors and clients. Only interested in 100k + clients and 150k+ investors to finish the second iteration of the bot. 

email to degreydna@proton.me if interested

should I share some stats with you directly from the code? [obviously not giving you the code ;D]
